query:
SELECT u.id, u.email, u.name, u.ageVerified, u.nsfwSubscriptionStatus, u.nsfwImagesUsed, u.nsfwImagesLimit, u.stripeCustomerId 
FROM users u 
WHERE u.email LIKE '%checolin%' OR u.email LIKE '%ramses%'
ORDER BY u.id DESC
LIMIT 5;
